Flow.description: ALN-156 - Created as a Rates tab on the shift to lookup candidate rates
Flow.label: nuuco - SHIFT - Rates Quoting

recordLookups.name: get_other_MPR_rates
recordLookups.label: get other MPR rates
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND (7 OR 8)

fields.name: dt_warning
fields.fieldText: WARNING: Candidate does not have an employment type set. Therefore cannot accurately get a rate. Please set the employment type on candidate record.

fields.name: dt_error
fields.fieldText:
ERROR


Candidate {!get_candidate.Name} does not have a ticket for the Shift Job Role Award Classification ({!get_Job_Role.tc9_ext_sirint__Award_Classification__r.Name}).


Please select another candidate or update the candidates tickets.

fields.name: error_MPR
fields.fieldText:
ERROR


No matching Minimum Pay Rate was found.


Details

Award Classification: {!get_Job_Role.tc9_ext_sirint__Award_Classification__r.Name}

Award Level: {!get_Candidate_Ticket.sirenum__TicketType__r.Award_Level__r.Name}

Template Group: {!get_Job_Role.Rate_Template_Group__r.Name}

Interpretation Rule: {!ff_InterpretationRule_Name}

fields.name: dt_Details
fields.fieldText:
RATE DETALS


{!get_candidate.Name}

{!get_candidate.MobilePhone}


Job Role: {!rec_shift.sirenum__Team__r.Name}


﻿Award Classification: {!get_Job_Role.tc9_ext_sirint__Award_Classification__r.Name}

Award Level: {!get_Candidate_Ticket.sirenum__TicketType__r.Award_Level__r.Name}

Rate Template Group: {!get_Job_Role.Rate_Template_Group__r.Name}


Employment Type: {!get_candidate.aa_Employment_Type__c}

Minimum Pay Rate Name: {!get_MPR.Name}

fields.name: dt_base_rate
fields.fieldText:
BASE PAY RATE


${!ff_Base_pay_rate}


{!get_MPR.Pay_Code_Name__c}

fields.name: dt_loaded
fields.fieldText:
LOADED PAY RATE


${!ff_loaded_pay_rate}


Loading: {!var_loading_percentage}%
